data.title: IMF Urges U.S. to Implement Strong Debt Consolidation Plan
data.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has emphasized the necessity for the United States to adopt a credible and robust debt consolidation strategy. According to Jin10, the IMF suggests that such a plan is essential to steer the debt-to-GDP ratio onto a downward trajectory. The organization highlights the importance of addressing fiscal challenges to ensure long-term economic stability and growth. The call for action comes amid ongoing discussions about the U.S. fiscal policy and its implications for the global economy.

data.title: CZ on Crypto Conviction: "GitHub Activity Tells You More Than the Price Ever Will"
data.description: Binance founder Changpeng Zhao "CZ" has shared his framework for identifying which crypto projects have genuine long-term staying power — pointing to developer activity and multi-cycle resilience as far more reliable indicators than price performance or marketing momentum.The question came from community member Yellow Pan, who noted that the current environment resembles the quiet bear market CZ had referenced earlier in the discussion — one where only the most resilient founders remain active. She asked how CZ personally distinguishes between crypto narratives built on real conviction and those driven purely by short-term hype.CZ acknowledged there is no single definitive test, but outlined several signals he considers meaningful. The most telling, he said, is GitHub activity. A project with consistent code commits, active developer contributions, and continuous evolution has what he described as a heartbeat — a visible sign that genuine work is being done regardless of market conditions. By contrast, many projects make a strong initial splash through marketing and a first launch, only for development activity to quietly fade before the price follows.He pointed to the longevity of a project across multiple market cycles as another key indicator. Projects that have survived previous bear markets and continued building are, in his view, significantly more likely to endure the next one. Those that peaked during a single cycle and then went quiet are a warning sign — regardless of how prominent they once appeared.CZ cited specific examples to illustrate the point. He noted that certain projects that ranked among the top tokens during the 2017 cycle have since seen dramatic drops in development activity and community engagement, while others have maintained more consistent, if quieter, progress. He was candid that singling out specific projects risks causing offense, but said the pattern is clear enough to be worth acknowledging.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 74,000 USDT with a 1.59% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 15, 2026, 13:43 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 74,000 USDT and is now trading at 73,973.9375 USDT, with a narrowed 1.59% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Elon Musk Encouraged to Use Equity-Equivalence Programs for Starlink in South Africa
data.description: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa has suggested that Elon Musk could utilize equity-equivalence programs to comply with the country's racial-equity regulations and introduce his Starlink internet service locally. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Ramaphosa's remarks on the potential for Musk's satellite internet service to expand in South Africa. Equity-equivalence programs are designed to promote racial equity by allowing companies to contribute to socio-economic development in lieu of direct ownership transfers. This approach could enable Musk's Starlink to navigate South Africa's stringent equity laws while providing internet access to underserved areas. The initiative aligns with the government's broader goals of enhancing digital connectivity and fostering economic growth through technological advancements.

data.title: CZ on Writing Freedom of Money: "My Story Is Crazy Enough — I Don't Need to Exaggerate Anything"
data.description: Binance founder CZ, has described the experience of writing his memoir Freedom of Money as both a relief and a reckoning — one that involved months of painstaking editing, difficult personal revelations, and a deliberate effort to reclaim his own narrative after years of negative coverage.Asked how it felt to finally publish the book and what he hopes readers take away from it, CZ said the overriding feeling upon completion was simply one of relief. The writing and publishing process, he explained, was far longer and more complex than many might expect — involving multiple rounds of editing, decisions around publishing routes, cover design, and whether to pursue a traditional publisher or self-publish.CZ said he studied the craft of memoir writing before putting pen to paper, reading works by other notable authors to understand what the process demands. One key lesson he took away was that the first draft is always going to be imperfect — and that the real work lies in the editing, which he described going through as many as ten to twenty times across a document running to around 300 pages, with each pass taking several weeks.He was candid about one of the less comfortable realities of writing a memoir — that honesty almost inevitably causes offense. When a book goes beyond surface-level storytelling and gets into the real problems, real decisions, and real feelings involved in building something, the people connected to those moments do not always come out looking the way they might prefer. CZ acknowledged this plainly, noting that memoir writing is widely considered an effective way to upset friends, and said he has made peace with that.He also addressed the scrutiny that comes with putting one's full story into the world. Having spent years operating in public life through social media, CZ said he has reached a point where he is comfortable being picked apart. The difference with a book, he noted, is the depth it allows — where a social media post offers a few dozen words, a memoir provides the space to tell a story in full, in one's own voice and on one's own terms.That control over narrative was a significant motivation for writing the book. CZ said that Binance and the broader crypto industry have long been on the receiving end of negatively framed coverage, and that Freedom of Money was an opportunity to present his own perspective on how key decisions were made, how he views the mistakes that occurred, and what the journey actually looked like from the inside.He was clear that the book was not intended as a coaching manual or educational guide — but rather as an honest account of an extraordinary set of experiences that he believes stands on its own as a compelling story. He also revealed that a significant amount of material was left out of this edition — details too recent, too sensitive, or tied to ongoing legal matters that could not yet be disclosed. A second edition, he suggested, could eventually include much of what was omitted.At its core, CZ said, the book exists to address the widespread misconceptions about who he is, what Binance is, and what crypto companies actually do.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks opened mixed, with Robinhood up 3.5%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.22%, the S&P 500 rose 0.13%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.18%. Cryptocurrency stocks showed mixed performance: Circle rose 2.36%, Coinbase fell 0.66%, Robinhood rose 3.5%, Hut 8 fell 1.14%, and Strategy rose 1.91%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Stock Market Opens with Mixed Performance
data.description: The U.S. stock market opened with mixed results as the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose by 0.22%, the S&P 500 index increased by 0.13%, and the Nasdaq Composite gained 0.18%. According to Jin10, shares of Broadcom (AVGO.O) climbed 1.4% following the extension of its custom chip agreement with Meta. Meanwhile, ASML (ASML.O) saw a decline of 3% at the start of trading.

data.title: Finance Ministers: Conflict Resolution May Not Halt Economic Impact
data.description: Finance ministers have issued a joint statement indicating that even if the ongoing conflict is resolved permanently, its effects on growth, inflation, and markets are likely to persist. According to Jin10, the ministers emphasized that the economic repercussions of the conflict could continue to influence global financial stability and economic performance. The statement highlights concerns over long-term impacts on economic indicators, suggesting that the resolution of the conflict alone may not be sufficient to restore previous economic conditions.

data.title: From Zero to Binance: CZ on Risk, Resilience, and the Road to Building an Empire
data.description: Binance founder Changpeng Zhao, widely known as CZ, has opened up about his entrepreneurial journey, revealing that his path to building one of the world's largest cryptocurrency exchanges was far from a straight line — and involved multiple failed startups, years of self-doubt, and nearly two decades of groundwork before Binance ever existed.Speaking during a discussion around his new book Freedom of Money, CZ reflected on how early exposure to small startups and entrepreneurial environments shaped his mindset from a young age. Working as a developer for startup founders gave him firsthand insight into what building a company actually looked like — long before he attempted it himself.He went on to work across several small companies before a stint at Bloomberg, which at the time employed thousands of people, quickly confirmed that large corporate structures were not for him. CZ described big companies as highly structured environments where certain personalities can thrive, but acknowledged that his own drive for freedom, flexibility, and dynamic teamwork made him ill-suited for a traditional career path. He was direct in saying he simply could not envision himself in a 9-to-5 role for twenty years.Rather than viewing his early failures as setbacks, CZ framed them as a deliberate and calculated progression. He advised aspiring entrepreneurs to manage risk carefully — ensuring that when a venture fails, the financial damage remains contained. He stressed the importance of taking on investments rather than loans, so founders are not left carrying debt after an unsuccessful venture. Despite this, CZ revealed he personally repaid all investors from his failed startups, making everyone whole.He was equally candid about the psychological weight of the journey. At multiple points along the way, CZ admitted he questioned whether he would ever break through or simply continue to struggle. But returning to a large company was never a real option in his mind — something he knew would only satisfy him for a few years before boredom set in.His path forward was built in layers. CZ first sharpened his technical skills before transitioning into business development as a junior partner at Fusion Systems Shanghai, where he gained experience in sales and client-facing work. He then stepped into the crypto industry, spending time at several companies to get a feel for a landscape he described as still very raw at the time.When the ICO wave arrived in 2017, CZ and his growing team were positioned to move. What began as a goal to raise $10 to $15 million evolved into something far larger, as Binance rode the momentum of the ICO boom and continued scaling by staying focused on user protection.CZ was clear that there was no single formula behind his success. He spent 17 years working and building before founding Binance — deliberately distancing himself from the narrative of the overnight genius or college dropout founder, noting that while those stories make headlines, they represent a very small minority. For CZ, the journey was organic, shaped over multiple decades by persistence, adaptability, and a willingness to keep going despite uncertainty.His core message to aspiring founders was straightforward: find what fits your personality, pursue what genuinely interests you, and focus on delivering real value to others. Do that, he said, and the chances of doing well will follow.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Meta Faces EU Ban Over WhatsApp Policies Impacting Rival AI Firms
data.description: Meta has been warned by the European Union about a potential interim ban concerning its policies on WhatsApp. Bloomberg posted on X that the EU alleges these policies may prevent rival AI companies from operating effectively on the platform. The tech giant is required to address the bloc's concerns to avoid the ban. The EU's move highlights ongoing regulatory scrutiny over major tech firms and their competitive practices in the AI sector.

data.title: Canaan Technology disclosed that it mined 89 BTC in March, and its Bitcoin holdings reached 1808 BTC.
data.description: Canaan Creative released its Bitcoin mining update report up to the end of March, disclosing that it mined 89 BTC in March, with a total Bitcoin holding of 1808 BTC. The company also held 3952 ETH. The network added over 10 MW of new capacity in March, bringing the global installed capacity to 266.3 MW. (Prnewswire)

data.title: ECB's Kazaks: No Objection to Two Rate Hikes Since June
data.description: European Central Bank Governing Council member Martins Kazaks has expressed no objection to the expectation of two interest rate hikes since June. According to Jin10, Kazaks' statement aligns with the ECB's ongoing monetary policy adjustments aimed at addressing inflationary pressures within the eurozone. The ECB has been actively managing interest rates to stabilize the economy and ensure price stability. Kazaks' comments reflect the central bank's commitment to its inflation targets and its readiness to implement necessary measures to achieve them.

data.title: ECB Official Kazaks: Stable Core Inflation is Positive
data.description: European Central Bank Governing Council member Kazaks stated that the lack of increase in core inflation is a positive development. According to Jin10, Kazaks emphasized the importance of maintaining stable inflation rates to support economic stability and growth. He noted that while headline inflation figures can fluctuate due to various factors, core inflation provides a clearer picture of underlying economic trends. Kazaks' comments come amid ongoing discussions about monetary policy adjustments in response to changing economic conditions.

data.title: Bitwise's Avalanche spot exchange trading product, BAVA, will be listed on the NYSE.
data.description: Bitwise Asset Management announced that its Avalanche spot exchange-traded product, Bitwise Avalanche ETP (BAVA), will be listed on the NYSE on April 15, 2026. This product aims to provide investors with exposure to AVAX and allow staking through Bitwise's on-chain solutions division. It aims to maximize liquidity while participating in Avalanche's average staking yield of approximately 5.4%, thereby enhancing overall returns. (Prnewswire)

data.title: CZ Says No New Startup Plans, But Leaves Door Open for Future Surprises
data.description: CZ Says No New Startup Plans, But Leaves Door Open for Future SurprisesBinance founder Changpeng Zhao, "CZ", has indicated he has no immediate plans to launch another startup, pointing to Binance's strong leadership team and his current focus on advisory and consultation work.The remarks came during discussions tied to his Binance Square book Freedom of Money, which is being promoted alongside a giveaway of 10 signed copies.When asked whether his founder's mindset remains active and whether a new venture — potentially in AI or outside of crypto — could be on the horizon, CZ said he is satisfied with where Binance stands today and has no concrete ambitions to start another company.He acknowledged that age and physical stamina are increasingly relevant factors in how he thinks about future commitments, noting that building a company from scratch demands an enormous and sustained level of energy.Despite this, CZ stopped short of ruling out future projects entirely, leaving open the possibility that circumstances could change down the line.The discussion also touched on a lighter note, with CZ crediting longtime Binance community supporter Spiky as the original creator of the well-known "four" hand sign associated with the Binance ecosystem — a symbol CZ later helped popularize by reposting it.

data.title: Crypto startup Brix raises $5.5 million, with participation from Circle Ventures and others.
data.description: Brix, a startup dedicated to tokenizing emerging market assets, announced the completion of a $5.5 million funding round. Participants included Yapi Kredi's venture capital arm, FRWRD, Is Asset Management, and crypto investment firms Circle Ventures, ConsenSys, and Borderless Capital. Brix plans to launch on the MegaETH network, aiming to bring traditionally large financial institutions-dominated trading strategies (such as Turkish lira arbitrage) onto the blockchain. (The Block)

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Global Silver Market Faces Sixth Consecutive Year of Supply Shortage
data.description:
The World Silver Association released its annual outlook on Wednesday, maintaining its previous stance that the global silver market will experience a supply shortage for the sixth consecutive year. According to Odaily, the report forecasts a 15% increase in the supply gap by 2026, reaching 46.3 million troy ounces. Despite an 18% rise in demand for silver bars and coins, consumption in industrial, photography, jewelry, and silverware sectors is expected to decline by 2%. Supply is projected to decrease by 2%, primarily due to a slight drop in mining output and reduced hedging, although a 7% increase in recycling will partially offset this.

The report indicates that while the Iran conflict casts a shadow over short-term price prospects, the outlook for silver for the remainder of 2026 remains "constructive." The association anticipates that the Middle East conflict will be controlled, and the tightening of monetary policy to curb energy inflation will be temporary. Even if the conflict persists, concerns over weak growth and fiscal constraints may lower real bond yields, thereby boosting interest in silver, gold, and other non-yielding precious metals. The report states, "The resurgence of safe-haven demand amid cyclical market liquidation should rekindle interest in gold and silver."

data.title: AI Startup Hilbert Secures $28 Million in Series A Funding Led by Andreessen Horowitz
data.description: AI startup Hilbert has announced the completion of a $28 million Series A funding round, led by venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz. According to Odaily, Hilbert aims to assist businesses in automating growth-driven commercial decisions, addressing the issue of substantial AI investments that do not always yield returns.

data.title: Prediction Markets Emerge as Trillion-Dollar Asset Class
data.description:
Prediction markets are rapidly evolving into a trillion-dollar asset class, fueled by increasing regulatory clarity, advancements in crypto infrastructure, and distribution through major trading platforms. According to CoinDesk, these factors are contributing to the significant growth and potential of prediction markets in the financial sector. 

The expansion of prediction markets is largely attributed to the establishment of clearer regulatory frameworks, which provide a more stable environment for investors and traders. This regulatory clarity is essential for fostering trust and encouraging participation from a broader range of market participants. Additionally, the integration of crypto rails has enhanced the efficiency and accessibility of these markets, allowing for seamless transactions and greater liquidity. 

Major trading platforms are also playing a crucial role in the distribution and adoption of prediction markets. By offering these markets to their users, platforms are expanding their product offerings and attracting new customers interested in innovative financial instruments. This increased exposure is helping to drive the growth of prediction markets, positioning them as a significant asset class in the global financial landscape.
